OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
One Brings Two they say and Muzarabani has brought KKR back in the contest with two quick breaks!, Blessing Muzarabani bowling to Abhishek Sharma, short of a good-length ball, pitching on the leg stump. Abhishek Sharma goes for a pull; he does not connect it well, as it is not middled. Varun Chakaravarthy at square leg dives forward and completes an excellent catch! This was looked at the replay, it shows the catch was cleanly taken, and Abhishek Sharma departs, he could not believe as he went to the dug-out in disappointment! 

WICKET Abhishek Sharma c Varun Chakaravarthy b Blessing Muzarabani (Sunrisers Hyderabad 112 Runs for 3 wickets)
